name: codex-harness-classroom
description: Korean-first classroom skill that safely scaffolds a three-agent Codex marketing harness from an Obsidian knowledge vault.

interface.longDescription: 초보자가 회사 지식창고인 Obsidian vault를 근거로 Fact Checker, Content Writer, Quality Checker 순서의 Codex 하네스를 안전하게 생성합니다.
